structured.title: Brock Lesnar's Retirement Future
structured.overview: The conversation centers on Brock Lesnar’s possible final match and what his exit means for wrestling. The speakers discuss how retirement in wrestling is never guaranteed, since the body and circumstances ultimately decide when a career ends. They praise Brock Lesnar for getting a strong crowd reaction and for 'passing the torch' properly to the next generation, especially toward Omos Femi, who is seen as having a major runway ahead. The tone is reflective and appreciative, with one speaker expressing pride in having played even a small part in Brock’s 25-year run.
